findings: Strongly correlated feature pairs in the cluster exhibit shortcut-like predictive leverage.
Fwd PSH Flags and SYN Flag Count show weak shortcut evidence likely due to low cardinality and perfect correlation.
Fwd Header Length shows moderate shortcut signal indicating redundancy contributes to predictive shortcuts.
Presence of duplicated rows creates unresolved tension but does not invalidate shortcut signals.
contradictions: Tension between perfect correlations and duplicated rows preserved as unresolved.
limitations: Unable to fully resolve impact of duplicated rows on redundancy and shortcut signals.
